category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Ecuadorian market.

title.en: China-to-Ecuador LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入厄瓜多尔：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入厄瓜多爾：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Ecuador's mandatory RTE INEN lighting technical regulations, NTE INEN / IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471 standards, Certificate of Conformity (INEN-1) requirements, energy-efficiency labelling, and ARCOTEL approval for smart luminaires, versus Chinese GB / GB/T standards and CCC certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与厄瓜多尔强制性 RTE INEN 照明技术法规、NTE INEN / IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471 标准、符合性证书（INEN-1）要求、能效标签及智能灯具 ARCOTEL 核准的差距对照，与中国 GB / GB/T 标准及 CCC 认证对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與厄瓜多爾強制性 RTE INEN 照明技術法規、NTE INEN / IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471 標準、符合性證書（INEN-1）要求、能效標籤及智能燈具 ARCOTEL 核准的差距對照，與中國 GB / GB/T 標準及 CCC 認證對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body determination, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Ecuadorian law, applicable RTE INEN technical regulations, NTE INEN standards, Certificate of Conformity procedures, energy labelling thresholds, voltage and frequency compatibility, and ARCOTEL requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构认定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行厄瓜多尔法律、适用的 RTE INEN 技术法规、NTE INEN 标准、符合性证书程序、能效标签阈值、电压与频率兼容性及 ARCOTEL 要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構認定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行厄瓜多爾法律、適用的 RTE INEN 技術法規、NTE INEN 標準、符合性證書程序、能效標籤閾值、電壓與頻率兼容性及 ARCOTEL 要求。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Ecuador must comply with the applicable mandatory RTE INEN technical regulation for lighting products and obtain a Certificate of Conformity (INEN-1 or recognized conformity-assessment route) before customs clearance and market placement; meet electrical safety per NTE INEN / IEC 60598-1 and lamp standards such as IEC 62560; design for Ecuador's 120/220 V 60 Hz grid rather than China's 220/380 V 50 Hz; provide the required energy-efficiency label; account for photobiological safety per IEC/EN 62471 where applicable; obtain ARCOTEL approval for any smart luminaire with wireless functionality; and work through an in-country importer. Ecuador does not operate an EU-style horizontal RoHS regime, an EU-style Ecodesign efficacy regulation, or a REACH-style SVHC supply-chain regime — so EU ecodesign and RoHS obligations map only partially. Existing Chinese CCC certification is not recognized for the Ecuadorian Certificate of Conformity.
answer_first.zh: 向厄瓜多尔出口的中国 LED 灯具制造商须：符合适用于照明产品的强制性 RTE INEN 技术法规，并在清关及上市前取得符合性证书（INEN-1 或认可的合格评定路径）；按 NTE INEN / IEC 60598-1 及 IEC 62560 等灯标准满足电气安全；按厄瓜多尔 120/220 V 60 Hz 电网（而非中国 220/380 V 50 Hz）进行设计；提供所需的能效标签；在适用时按 IEC/EN 62471 考虑光生物安全；对任何具备无线功能的智能灯具取得 ARCOTEL 核准；并通过当地进口商办理。厄瓜多尔不实行欧盟式横向 RoHS 制度、欧盟式生态设计能效法规或 REACH 式 SVHC 供应链制度——因此欧盟生态设计与 RoHS 义务仅部分对应。现有中国 CCC 认证不被厄瓜多尔符合性证书所认可。
answer_first.zht: 向厄瓜多爾出口的中國 LED 燈具製造商須：符合適用於照明產品的強制性 RTE INEN 技術法規，並在清關及上市前取得符合性證書（INEN-1 或認可的合格評定路徑）；按 NTE INEN / IEC 60598-1 及 IEC 62560 等燈標準滿足電氣安全；按厄瓜多爾 120/220 V 60 Hz 電網（而非中國 220/380 V 50 Hz）進行設計；提供所需的能效標籤；在適用時按 IEC/EN 62471 考慮光生物安全；對任何具備無線功能的智能燈具取得 ARCOTEL 核准；並通過當地進口商辦理。厄瓜多爾不實行歐盟式橫向 RoHS 制度、歐盟式生態設計能效法規或 REACH 式 SVHC 供應鏈制度——因此歐盟生態設計與 RoHS 義務僅部分對應。現有中國 CCC 認證不被厄瓜多爾符合性證書所認可。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Re-verify each review cycle against current RTE INEN lighting technical regulations, the applicable NTE INEN / IEC standard editions, the Certificate of Conformity procedure, energy-label thresholds, and ARCOTEL requirements.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. RTE INEN regulation numbers, NTE INEN standard references, and Certificate of Conformity routes must be re-verified against the current INEN catalogue and Ecuadorian regulatory sources on each review cycle.
